creator: treif@mayn.de
text:
The distfile is unfetchable.

Fix: --------------9EE7D98065777D96F15A062C
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii;
 name="port_wterm.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline;
 filename="port_wterm.diff"



--------------9EE7D98065777D96F15A062C----jvC9OWAWZ4xeZ5RsV3ZXumarM2L7NRqRVwNFfjSRvGcMBgQy
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -u --exclude=CVS -ruN --exclude=CVS wterm.orig/Makefile wterm/Makefile
--- wterm.orig/Makefile	Sat Mar 10 14:01:25 2001
+++ wterm/Makefile	Sun May 27 16:21:51 2001
@@ -8,10 +8,9 @@
 PORTNAME=	wterm
 PORTVERSION=	6.2.8a2
 CATEGORIES=	x11
-MASTER_SITES= 	http://wm.current.nu/files/ \
-		ftp://ftp.sunsite.auc.dk/disk1/linuxberg.com/files/x11/system/ \
-		ftp://ftp.vision.net.au/ftp7/linuxberg/files/x11/system/ \
-		ftp://ftp.cadvision.com/pub/linuxberg/files/x11/system/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://wm.current.nu/files/ \
+		ftp://sunsite.uio.no/pub/unix/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ \
+		ftp://ftp3.ru.freebsd.org/.0/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/
 
 MAINTAINER=	treif@mayn.de
